fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Helicone -> Settings -> API Keys. The sk-helicone-... value. Sent as a Bearer token.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates the API key via the request query endpoint

metadata.summary: Helicone LLM observability — one-line proxy for logging, cost tracking, caching, and analytics across OpenAI, Anthropic, and more.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign in at helicone.ai
2. Go to Settings -> API Keys
3. Click 'Generate New Key' and copy the sk-helicone-... value
4. Paste it here
